headline: Assessing Labcorp (LH) Valuation As Shares Cool And P/E Trails Healthcare Peers
summary: Labcorp Holdings stock snapshot Labcorp Holdings (LH) stock has been moving without a clear single catalyst, which leads many investors to focus on its fundamentals, including recent returns, revenue, earnings and its current valuation profile. See our latest analysis for Labcorp Holdings. At a share price of $256.87, Labcorp Holdings has seen its short term share price momentum cool, with the share price down over the past week and three months, while longer term total shareholder returns...
